meta.title: Hand Crafted Cabins in Hay-on-Wye | Wye Cabins
meta.description: Book hand crafted cabins in the Brecon Beacons near Hay-on-Wye. Romantic retreats with mountain views, fire pits and starry skies. Choose from Holly, Bramble or The Book Nook.
meta.ogDescription: Book hand crafted cabins in the Brecon Beacons near Hay-on-Wye. Romantic retreats with mountain views, fire pits and starry skies.

antidote.title: The antidote to modern life
antidote.body: Wye Cabins is perfect for a romantic retreat or just something a bit different. We offer everything you need to relax in style, surrounded by nature. Nestled in a magical corner of the Brecon Beacons National Park, you'd struggle to find a better site. We've got mountain views, a babbling brook, incredible wild flowers and oodles of space to explore. By night, sit around the fire pit under incredible starry skies.
antidote.tagline: Whether you're after a romantic retreat or just something a bit different, join us for the ultimate stress free holiday.

mailing.title: Subscribe to our mailing list
mailing.body: Sign up with your email address to receive news and special offers. We promise to respect your inbox.
